headline: Crimson Tide Pods: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Crimson Tide Pods carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 65.45, led by DeVonta Smith, Alec Pierce, and Justin Herbert. The immediate preseason decision is not broad roster turnover; it is whether the FLEX slot currently occupied by Jerry Jeudy (49.1 C-AVI) can be improved without weakening the verified core.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are DeVonta Smith (87.5), Alec Pierce (75.1), and Justin Herbert (72.2). That concentration gives Crimson Tide Pods a defined top-end identity.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Among the eight verified championship-lineup slots, Jerry Jeudy is the lowest C-AVI starter at 49.1. Any preseason acquisition should be measured against that exact lineup threshold, not against the bottom of the bench.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 11 offensive players, leaving 3 offensive players outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 66.55, which should be used to judge whether consolidation improves the lineup more than it reduces flexibility.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 11 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active. There is no knowledge-backed reason for an emergency replacement move this week.

sections.title: Draft Assets
sections.body: No franchise-labelled draft asset was found in the approved knowledge files. The summary does not infer ownership from roster position or prior conversations.
